contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Members search filter + persistence + site-wide top-nav canonicalization
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/109
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/111
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/113
  
  Details:
  truesight_me consistency + members search:
  
  1. Members search filter — live search box above the Governors grid on /members.html. As the operator types, cards are filtered by display name / slug / primary program against a pre-computed haystack (one cheap includes() per card per keystroke). Section headers (Governors / Members) auto-hide when their grid is fully filtered out, so a search for "fatima" doesn't leave an empty "Governors" heading. Match-count chip ("23 of 377 matching"). Escape clears.
  
  2. Persisted across refresh — the active query mirrors to the URL via history.replaceState as ?q=... and to localStorage on every keystroke. Refreshing restores the prior filter; the URL is shareable as a deep link (truesight.me/members.html?q=kris). Precedence on load: URL > localStorage > empty.
  
  3. Canonical top nav across the whole site — Gary noticed the top nav had drifted (different items in dropdowns, missing Programs link in some pages, dead Wix members-directory URL still on some subpages, ordering inconsistencies). New scripts/sync_top_nav.py is the single source of truth: defines the canonical nav as a template parameterised by per-page path prefix (no prefix at root, ../ one level deep, ../../ two), walks every *.html, finds the <nav class="site-header"> block, re-emits canonical with the source file's leading whitespace preserved. Idempotent: second run reports ok=89, rewrote=0, divergent=0. 88 pages rewritten in one pass.
  
  4. CI guard — new .github/workflows/nav-consistency.yml runs the same script in --check mode on push/PR. Future nav drift fails the build so the operator runs the script locally to fix.
  
  5. Each beta merge promoted to truesight.me via gh repo sync of truesight_me_prod fork per the established convention.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
